claims: The skill's primary purpose is to function as an e-commerce customer service assistant for generating replies and processing inquiries. However, it requests the ability (via the optional Playwright MCP) to automatically log into and operate user accounts on multiple e-commerce platform backends (e.g., Taobao, JD.com, Shopify). This grants it broad, unsupervised access to perform any action within those accounts (beyond just reading order status), which is excessive and poses a significant security risk. The optional nature does not mitigate the overreach when the feature is used, as the skill description encourages this method for "real order status."
